title: Grim Reaper 3
overview: Bethany thought she'd survived the infamous Grim Reaper killer two years ago. Kaleb thought he'd left that world behind after retiring from the police force. Now the Reaper back, and Bethany and Kaleb have teamed up to end his reign of slaughter once and for all.
